top_signals.title: Nvidia lifts dividend as investors fret about growth prospects
top_signals.summary: Shares in the world’s most valuable company dip despite better than expected revenue and forecasts
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tate & Lyle admits ‘disappointing year’ as US buyer circles
top_signals.summary: Tate & Lyle has seen profit and revenue slip in what the ingredients firm described as a “disappointing year” marked by muted demand, as a US buyer circles. The FTSE 250 company saw revenue slip by three per cent to £2bn as profit before tax fell by 10 per cent to £238m in the year [...]
